## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] Documentation only

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `dart analyze lib/ bin/ --fatal-infos` — zero issues
- [ ] `dart test --exclude-tags integration` — all tests pass
- [ ] `dart compile exe bin/server.dart` — builds successfully
- [ ] Manual testing with a running Flutter app

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style and conventions
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated `AGENTS.md` if tool names or behaviour changed
- [ ] I have updated `ISSUES.md` if addressing a known issue or adding debt
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in `AGENTS.md`
